en: "You shall therefore love the LORD your God and keep his charge, his statutes, his rules, and his commandments always.
zh: “所以你要愛耶和華你的 神，常常遵守他的吩咐、律例、典章和誡命。

en: And consider today (since I am not speaking to your children who have not known or seen it), consider the discipline of the LORD your God, his greatness, his mighty hand and his outstretched arm,
zh: 今日你們要知道，我並不是與你們的兒女說話，因為他們不知道，也沒有見過耶和華你們的 神的管教、偉大有力的手和伸出來的膀臂，

en: his signs and his deeds that he did in Egypt to Pharaoh the king of Egypt and to all his land,
zh: 以及他在埃及向埃及王法老和法老的全國所行的神蹟和作為；

en: and what he did to the army of Egypt, to their horses and to their chariots, how he made the water of the Red Sea flow over them as they pursued after you, and how the LORD has destroyed them to this day,
zh: 他們也沒有見過他怎樣對待埃及的軍隊、馬匹和車輛；他們追趕你們的時候，耶和華怎樣使紅海的水淹沒了他們，把他們滅絕，這事一直傳到今日；

en: and what he did to you in the wilderness, until you came to this place,
zh: 並且耶和華在曠野怎樣待你們，直到你們來到了這個地方；

en: and what he did to Dathan and Abiram the sons of Eliab, son of Reuben, how the earth opened its mouth and swallowed them up, with their households, their tents, and every living thing that followed them, in the midst of all Israel.
zh: 也沒有見過他怎樣對待流本的子孫以利押的兒子大坍、亞比蘭；大地怎樣在全體以色列人中間裂開了，把他們和他們的家人、帳棚，以及與他們在一起一切有生命之物都吞下去；

en: For your eyes have seen all the great work of the LORD that he did.
zh: 只有你們親眼看見了耶和華所作的一切偉大的作為。

en: "You shall therefore keep the whole commandment that I command you today, that you may be strong, and go in and take possession of the land that you are going over to possess,
zh: “所以你們要遵守我今日吩咐你的一切誡命，使你們堅強起來，可以進去得著你們將要過去得的那地，

en: and that you may live long in the land that the LORD swore to your fathers to give to them and to their offspring, a land flowing with milk and honey.
zh: 又使你們在耶和華向你們的列祖起誓應許賜給他們和他們後裔的地上，就是流奶與蜜的地，可以長久居住。

en: For the land that you are entering to take possession of it is not like the land of Egypt, from which you have come, where you sowed your seed and irrigated it, like a garden of vegetables.
zh: 因為你要進去得的那地，並不像你出來的埃及地；在那裡你撒了種，還要用腳灌溉，像菜園一樣。

en: But the land that you are going over to possess is a land of hills and valleys, which drinks water by the rain from heaven,
zh: 但你們要過去得為業的地，卻是一個有山有谷的地，有天上雨水滋潤的地，

en: a land that the LORD your God cares for. The eyes of the LORD your God are always upon it, from the beginning of the year to the end of the year.
zh: 就是耶和華你的 神眷顧的地；從歲首到年終，耶和華你的 神的眼目常常眷顧這地。

en: "And if you will indeed obey my commandments that I command you today, to love the LORD your God, and to serve him with all your heart and with all your soul,
zh: “如果你們留心聽我今日吩咐你們的誡命，愛耶和華你們的 神，一心一意事奉他，

en: he will give the rain for your land in its season, the early rain and the later rain, that you may gather in your grain and your wine and your oil.
zh: 他 必按時降雨在你們的地上，就是降秋雨和春雨，使你們可以豐收五穀、新酒和新油。

en: And he will give grass in your fields for your livestock, and you shall eat and be full.
zh: 他也必使田野為你的牲畜長出青草來，你也可以吃得飽足。

en: Take care lest your heart be deceived, and you turn aside and serve other gods and worship them;
zh: 你們要謹慎，免得你們的心受迷惑，你們就偏離了我，去事奉別的神，並且敬拜它們；

en: then the anger of the LORD will be kindled against you, and he will shut up the heavens, so that there will be no rain, and the land will yield no fruit, and you will perish quickly off the good land that the LORD is giving you.
zh: 叫耶和華的怒氣向你發作，就把天封閉，不降下雨水，地也不生出土產，使你們從耶和華賜給你們的美地上，快快地滅亡。

en: "You shall therefore lay up these words of mine in your heart and in your soul, and you shall bind them as a sign on your hand, and they shall be as frontlets between your eyes.
zh: “所以你們要把我這些話放在心裡，存在意念中；要繫在手上作記號，戴在額上作頭帶。

en: You shall teach them to your children, talking of them when you are sitting in your house, and when you are walking by the way, and when you lie down, and when you rise.
zh: 你們也要把這些話教訓你們的兒女，無論你是坐在家裡，行在路上，躺下，或是起來，都要講論。

en: You shall write them on the doorposts of your house and on your gates,
zh: 你要把這些話寫在你房屋的門柱上和城門上，

en: that your days and the days of your children may be multiplied in the land that the LORD swore to your fathers to give them, as long as the heavens are above the earth.
zh: 為要叫你們和你們的子孫的日子，在耶和華向你們列祖起誓應許給他們的地上，可以增多，像天覆地的年日那樣多。

en: For if you will be careful to do all this commandment that I command you to do, loving the LORD your God, walking in all his ways, and holding fast to him,
zh: 如果你們殷勤謹守遵行我吩咐你們的這一切誡命，愛耶和華你們的 神，行他的一切道路，又緊緊地依靠他，

en: then the LORD will drive out all these nations before you, and you will dispossess nations greater and mightier than yourselves.
zh: 耶和華就必從你們面前把這些國民都趕出去，你們就必佔領比你們大比你們強的國民的地。

en: Every place on which the sole of your foot treads shall be yours. Your territory shall be from the wilderness to the Lebanon and from the River, the river Euphrates, to the western sea.
zh: 你們腳掌所踏的地，都必屬於你們；從曠野到黎巴嫩，從幼發拉底河直到西海，都要作你們的境界。

en: No one shall be able to stand against you. The LORD your God will lay the fear of you and the dread of you on all the land that you shall tread, as he promised you.
zh: 必沒有一人能在你們面前站立得住；耶和華你們的 神，必照著他對你們所說的，使害怕和驚懼你們的心臨到你們將要踏足之地的居民。

en: "See, I am setting before you today a blessing and a curse:
zh: “看哪，我今日把祝福和咒詛都擺在你們面前。

en: the blessing, if you obey the commandments of the LORD your God, which I command you today,
zh: 如果你們聽從耶和華你們的 神的誡命，就是我今日吩咐你們的，你們就必蒙賜福；

en: and the curse, if you do not obey the commandments of the LORD your God, but turn aside from the way that I am commanding you today, to go after other gods that you have not known.
zh: 如果你們不聽從耶和華你們的 神的誡命，偏離了我今日吩咐你們要走的道路，去隨從你們素來不認識的別神，你們就必受咒詛。

en: And when the LORD your God brings you into the land that you are entering to take possession of it, you shall set the blessing on Mount Gerizim and the curse on Mount Ebal.
zh: 耶和華你的 神領你進入你要佔領為業之地以後，你就要把祝福擺在基利心山上，把咒詛擺在以巴路山上。

en: Are they not beyond the Jordan, west of the road, toward the going down of the sun, in the land of the Canaanites who live in the Arabah, opposite Gilgal, beside the oak of Moreh?
zh: 這兩座山不是在約旦河西、日落的地方，在住亞拉巴的迦南人之地，與吉甲相對，靠近摩利橡樹那裡嗎？

en: For you are to cross over the Jordan to go in to take possession of the land that the LORD your God is giving you. And when you possess it and live in it,
zh: 現在你們快要過約旦河，進去得耶和華你們的 神要賜給你們為業之地；你們取得了那地，就住在那裡。

en: you shall be careful to do all the statutes and the rules that I am setting before you today.
zh: 你們要謹守遵行我今日在你們的面前頒布的一切律例和典章。”
